# [Clang] Assertion failure in SmallVector::back() while parsing invalid declaration with trailing return type

**Author:** YuchangSu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/186571
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-14T20:50:19Z

## Body

Code:
```CPP
a()( enum b  () ->auto
```

Assertion failure:
```text
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/SmallVector.h:315: T& llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon<T, <template-parameter-1-2> >::back() [with T = clang::InventedTemplateParameterInfo; <template-parameter-1-2> = void; llvm::SmallVectorTemplateCommon<T, <template-parameter-1-2> >::reference = clang::InventedTemplateParameterInfo&]: Assertion `!empty()' failed.
```
